name: Rainbogeddon
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some arcade action in Rainbogeddon! In this neon-coloured adventure made by Nitrome, you'll have to collect all the dots to win. Be careful though! There's enemies looking to get you while you make your way around the map. Got a friend nearby? Then you can play together in 2 player mode. Can you make it through all 40 levels unscathed? How to play Rainbogeddon? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move! Use spacebar to fire your weapon! Who created Rainbogeddon? Rainbogeddon is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Rainbogeddon for free? You can play Rainbogeddon for free on Poki. Can I play Rainbogeddon with my friend? Yes! Rainbogeddon is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer! Can I play Rainbogeddon on mobile devices and desktop? Rainbogeddon can be played on your computer only.
